evidence.stakeholder_orientation: own analytics across Doodle's self serve Product Led Growth business and Enterprise Revenue organisation
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Equal weight between product (PLG, funnel, experimentation, cohort analysis) and commercial (Enterprise Revenue, subscription metrics) makes this mixed.
evidence.autonomy_level: own analytics across Doodle's self serve Product Led Growth business and Enterprise Revenue organisation
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The verb 'own' applied to the entire PLG and Enterprise Revenue analytics remit signals strategic autonomy — this role sets direction, not just executes tasks.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: build datasets and reporting models to eliminate manual processes; improve data accessibility
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of building new data products (greenfield) and eliminating existing manual processes (fix/scale) produces mixed.

ai_role_reasoning: Candidate expected to assess AI tool capabilities and performance, indicating use rather than infrastructure building.
testing_framing_quote: establish trusted business metrics; own analytics
testing_framing_reasoning: Ownership verbs 'establish' and 'own' applied to metrics and analytics practice signal candidate owns the quality discipline.
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Role emphasizes growth, experimentation, and PLG velocity without regulatory, audit, or compliance-driven framing.
